summary: addMessage() now persists to the database via insertMessages([message]) (fire-and-forget with error logging) before updating the SolidJS state signal. Used insertMessages (accepts full Message with existing id+createdAt) rather than saveMessage (which generates its own id+createdAt). The session load path (loadSessionMessages -> getMessages) was already correct and reads from the DB. All 5 call sites in useAgent.ts automatically benefit. tsc --noEmit passed with zero errors.
